intro: Over the two weeks from 12 to 26 April 2026, ZCyberNews published 68 articles tagged supply-chain, reflecting a period of intense activity. The threat actors Lazarus Group, CanisterSprawl, and TeamPCP were observed, while critical vulnerabilities CVE-2026-1731 (CVSS 9.8), CVE-2026-39987 (CVSS 9.3), CVE-2026-40176, and CVE-2026-40177 were highlighted. Coverage spanned the technology, software development, cryptocurrency, logistics, and manufacturing sectors, with global impact across Asia, Europe, the Arctic, and China. The severity mix included 10 critical, 11 medium, 42 high, and 4 informational reports.
